headline: 読む前に、壊せ。
audience: small teams who want memorable interactive landing pages
tone: Stylish business website with playful, breakable game-layer contrast
businessMessage: Modern visitors often do not read first. CharaBreak turns the pre-reading moment into interactive play, increasing content contact, dwell time, page memory, and multi-page engagement.

pages.title: CharaBreak
pages.purpose: Top page and playable product introduction

pages.title: Features
pages.purpose: Explain core plugin capabilities with editable Elementor-native cards

pages.title: Pricing
pages.purpose: Show free one-page plan and paid one-site plan through Freemius

pages.title: Playable Demo
pages.purpose: Give visitors a stylish page with enough text, images, icons, and buttons to break

pages.title: FAQ
pages.purpose: Answer purchase, compatibility, distribution, and business-use questions

implementation.gameStart: Use Elementor button widgets with gw-inline-start class and #gaming-web-start link
